testcase.name: selectRightJoin
testcase.system-out: 04:26:06.325 [main] DEBUG org.apache.ibatis.logging.LogFactory - Logging initialized using 'class org.apache.ibatis.logging.slf4j.Slf4jImpl' adapter. 04:26:06.345 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - original SQL: SELECT * FROM entity e right join entity1 e1 on e1.id = e.id 04:26:06.375 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - SQL to parse, SQL: SELECT * FROM entity e right join entity1 e1 on e1.id = e.id 04:26:06.382 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - parse the finished SQL: SELECT * FROM entity e RIGHT JOIN entity1 e1 ON e1.id = e.id AND e.tenant_id = 1 WHERE e1.tenant_id = 1 04:26:06.382 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - original SQL: SELECT * FROM with_as_1 e right join entity1 e1 on e1.id = e.id 04:26:06.382 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - SQL to parse, SQL: SELECT * FROM with_as_1 e right join entity1 e1 on e1.id = e.id 04:26:06.384 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - parse the finished SQL: SELECT * FROM with_as_1 e RIGHT JOIN entity1 e1 ON e1.id = e.id WHERE e1.tenant_id = 1 04:26:06.384 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - original SQL: SELECT * FROM entity e right join entity1 e1 on e1.id = e.id WHERE e.id = ? OR e.name = ? 04:26:06.385 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - SQL to parse, SQL: SELECT * FROM entity e right join entity1 e1 on e1.id = e.id WHERE e.id = ? testcase.name: selectFromSelect
testcase.system-out: 04:26:06.390 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - original SQL: SELECT * FROM (select e.id from entity e WHERE e.id = (select e1.id from entity1 e1 where e1.id = ?)) 04:26:06.391 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - SQL to parse, SQL: SELECT * FROM (select e.id from entity e WHERE e.id = (select e1.id from entity1 e1 where e1.id = ?)) 04:26:06.392 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - parse the finished SQL: SELECT * FROM (SELECT e.id FROM entity e WHERE e.id = (SELECT e1.id FROM entity1 e1 WHERE e1.id = ? AND e1.tenant_id = 1) AND e.tenant_id = 1)

OR name = ?) 04:26:06.419 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - parse the finished SQL: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE NOT (id = ? OR name = ?) AND t_user.tenant_id = 1 AND t_user.dept_id IN (10, 20)

testcase.name: selectIgnoreTable
testcase.system-out: 04:26:06.421 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - original SQL: SELECT dict.dict_code, item.item_text AS "text", item.item_value AS "value" FROM sys_dict_item item INNER JOIN sys_dict dict ON dict.id = item.dict_id WHERE dict.dict_code IN (1, 2, 3) AND item.item_value IN (1, 2, 3) 04:26:06.423 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - SQL to parse, SQL: SELECT dict.dict_code, item.item_text AS "text", item.item_value AS "value" FROM sys_dict_item item INNER JOIN sys_dict dict ON dict.id = item.dict_id WHERE dict.dict_code IN (1, 2, 3) AND item.item_value IN (1, 2, 3) 04:26:06.423 [main] DEBUG com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DataPermissionInterceptor - parse the finished SQL: SELECT dict.dict_code, item.item_text AS "text", item.item_value AS "value" FROM sys_dict_item item INNER JOIN sys_dict dict ON dict.id = item.dict_id AND item.tenant_id = 1 WHERE dict.dict_code IN (1, 2, 3) AND item.item_value IN (1, 2, 3)
